hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$branch" = "master" ] || exit 0; case "$cmd" in *"git push"*) case "$cmd" in *" --force"*|*" -f "*|*" -f") printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force-push to master is blocked by a repo guard hook. Push to a branch or remove the --force flag."}}';; esac ;; esac; exit 0
